metadata.name: sigil
metadata.description: On-chain guardrails for AI agents on Solana - Permission controls, spending limits, and audit infrastructure for autonomous agents (Sigil)

instructions.name: agent_transfer
docs: Transfer tokens from the vault to an allowed destination.
Only the agent can call this. Stablecoin-only.

accounts.name: tracker
docs: Zero-copy SpendTracker

accounts.name: agent_spend_overlay
docs: Zero-copy AgentSpendOverlay — per-agent rolling spend

accounts.name: vault_token_account
docs: Vault's PDA-owned token account (source)

accounts.name: token_mint_account
docs: Token mint account for decimals validation

accounts.name: destination_token_account
docs: Destination token account (must be in allowed destinations)

accounts.name: fee_destination_token_account
docs: Developer fee destination token account

accounts.name: protocol_treasury_token_account
docs: Protocol treasury token account

instructions.name: allocate_constraints_pda
docs: Allocate the InstructionConstraints PDA at 10,240 bytes (CPI limit).
Must be followed by extend_pda calls + create_instruction_constraints
in the same atomic transaction to reach full SIZE.

accounts.name: constraints
docs: Account must not already exist (lamports == 0).

instructions.name: allocate_pending_constraints_pda
docs: Allocate the PendingConstraintsUpdate PDA at 10,240 bytes (CPI limit).
Must be followed by extend_pda calls + queue_constraints_update
in the same atomic transaction.

accounts.name: constraints
docs: Existing constraints PDA must exist (proves there's something to update).

instructions.name: apply_agent_permissions_update
docs: Apply a queued agent permissions update after timelock expires.

accounts.name: agent_spend_overlay
docs: Agent spend overlay — per-agent tracking slot.

instructions.name: apply_close_constraints
docs: Apply a queued constraint closure after timelock expires.
Closes the constraints PDA, clears policy.has_constraints, bumps policy_version.

instructions.name: apply_constraints_update
docs: Apply a queued constraints update after the timelock expires.

accounts.name: policy
docs: PolicyConfig — needed to bump policy_version on constraint changes.

instructions.name: apply_pending_policy
docs: Apply a queued policy update after the timelock expires.

instructions.name: cancel_agent_permissions_update
docs: Cancel a queued agent permissions update.

instructions.name: cancel_close_constraints
docs: Cancel a queued constraint closure.

instructions.name: cancel_constraints_update
docs: Cancel a queued constraints update.

instructions.name: cancel_pending_policy
docs: Cancel a queued policy update.

instructions.name: close_post_assertions
docs: Close post-execution assertions for a vault. Returns rent to owner.

instructions.name: close_settled_escrow
docs: Close a settled/refunded escrow PDA — owner reclaims rent.

accounts.name: destination_vault_key
docs: Validated indirectly: if the wrong key is passed, the escrow PDA seeds won't
match and Anchor will reject the account.

instructions.name: close_vault
docs: Close the vault entirely. Reclaims rent from all PDAs.

accounts.name: tracker
docs: Zero-copy SpendTracker — close returns rent to owner

accounts.name: agent_spend_overlay
docs: Zero-copy AgentSpendOverlay — close returns rent to owner

instructions.name: create_escrow
docs: Create an escrow deposit between two vaults.
Agent-initiated, stablecoin-only, fees deducted upfront, cap-checked.

accounts.name: agent_spend_overlay
docs: Zero-copy AgentSpendOverlay — per-agent rolling spend

accounts.name: source_vault_ata
docs: Source vault's token account (vault PDA is authority)

accounts.name: escrow_ata
docs: Escrow-owned ATA — init_if_needed because escrow PDA is created in same ix

accounts.name: protocol_treasury_ata
docs: Protocol treasury token account (needed when protocol_fee > 0)

accounts.name: fee_destination_ata
docs: Developer fee destination token account (needed when developer_fee > 0)

instructions.name: create_instruction_constraints
docs: Populate a pre-allocated InstructionConstraints PDA with entries.
Only the owner can call this. PDA must be at full SIZE.

accounts.name: constraints
docs: Verified in handler: correct size, program-owned, vault match, no discriminator yet.

instructions.name: create_post_assertions
docs: Create post-execution assertions for a vault.
Assertions check account data bytes AFTER DeFi instructions execute.

instructions.name: deposit_funds
docs: Deposit SPL tokens into the vault's PDA-controlled token account.
Only the owner can call this.

accounts.name: owner_token_account
docs: Owner's token account to transfer from

accounts.name: vault_token_account
docs: Vault's PDA-controlled token account

instructions.name: extend_pda
docs: Grow a program-owned PDA by up to 10,240 bytes per call.
Used to extend constraints/pending PDAs to full SIZE before population.

accounts.name: pda
docs: owner == crate::ID, vault bytes match, size within bounds.

instructions.name: finalize_session
docs: Finalize a session after the DeFi action completes.
Revokes delegation, closes SessionAuthority PDA.

accounts.name: session
docs: Session rent is returned to the session's agent (who paid for it).
Seeds include token_mint for per-token concurrent sessions.

accounts.name: policy
docs: Policy config for outcome-based cap checking during finalization

accounts.name: tracker
docs: Zero-copy SpendTracker for recording non-stablecoin swap value

accounts.name: agent_spend_overlay
docs: Zero-copy AgentSpendOverlay — per-agent rolling spend

accounts.name: vault_token_account
docs: Vault's PDA token account for the session's token

accounts.name: output_stablecoin_account
docs: Vault's stablecoin ATA for outcome-based spending verification.
Required when session.output_mint != Pubkey::default() (all spending).

accounts.name: instructions_sysvar
docs: Instructions sysvar for post-finalize instruction verification.

instructions.name: freeze_vault
docs: Freeze the vault immediately. Preserves all agent entries.
Only the owner can call this. Use reactivate_vault to unfreeze.

instructions.name: initialize_vault
docs: Initialize a new agent vault with policy configuration.
Only the owner can call this. Creates vault PDA, policy PDA,
and zero-copy spend tracker PDA.

accounts.name: tracker
docs: Zero-copy SpendTracker

accounts.name: agent_spend_overlay
docs: Agent spend overlay — per-agent contribution tracking

instructions.name: pause_agent
docs: Pause a specific agent. Blocks all agent actions while preserving config.
Only the owner can call this.

instructions.name: queue_agent_permissions_update
docs: Queue an agent permissions update. Timelock-gated.
Per-agent PDA allows concurrent pending updates for different agents.

instructions.name: queue_close_constraints
docs: Queue a constraint closure. Timelock-gated.

accounts.name: constraints
docs: Verify constraints PDA exists (proves there's something to close).

instructions.name: queue_constraints_update
docs: Queue a constraints update when timelock is active.

accounts.name: constraints
docs: Existing constraints — seeds verify PDA, bump verified via load().

accounts.name: pending_constraints
docs: Verified in handler: correct size, program-owned, vault match, no discriminator.

instructions.name: queue_policy_update
docs: Queue a policy update when timelock is active.

instructions.name: reactivate_vault
docs: Reactivate a frozen vault. Optionally add a new agent with permissions.

instructions.name: refund_escrow
docs: Refund an escrow — source vault's agent or owner reclaims funds after expiry.
Cap charge is NOT reversed (prevents cap-washing attacks).

accounts.name: source_signer
docs: Source vault's agent or owner

instructions.name: register_agent
docs: Register an agent's signing key to this vault with per-agent permissions.
Only the owner can call this. Up to 10 agents per vault.

accounts.name: agent_spend_overlay
docs: Agent spend overlay — per-agent tracking slot.

instructions.name: revoke_agent
docs: Revoke a specific agent from the vault.
Only the owner can call this. Freezes vault if last agent is removed.

accounts.name: agent_spend_overlay
docs: Agent spend overlay — release slot on revocation.

instructions.name: settle_escrow
docs: Settle an escrow — destination vault's agent claims funds before expiry.
For conditional escrows, proof must match the SHA-256 condition hash.

instructions.name: unpause_agent
docs: Unpause a paused agent. Restores ability to execute actions.
Only the owner can call this.

instructions.name: validate_and_authorize
docs: Core permission check. Called by the agent before a DeFi action.
Validates against policy constraints, stablecoin-only enforcement,
and protocol slippage verification.
Creates a SessionAuthority PDA, delegates tokens to agent.

accounts.name: tracker
docs: Zero-copy SpendTracker

accounts.name: agent_spend_overlay
docs: Zero-copy AgentSpendOverlay — per-agent rolling spend

accounts.name: session
docs: Ephemeral session PDA — `init` ensures no double-authorization.
Seeds include token_mint for per-token concurrent sessions.

accounts.name: vault_token_account
docs: Vault's PDA-owned token account for the spend token

accounts.name: token_mint_account
docs: The token mint being spent — constrained to match token_mint arg

accounts.name: protocol_treasury_token_account
docs: Protocol treasury token account (needed when protocol_fee > 0)

accounts.name: fee_destination_token_account
docs: Developer fee destination token account (needed when developer_fee > 0)

accounts.name: output_stablecoin_account
docs: Vault's stablecoin ATA to snapshot (for non-stablecoin input spending).
Required when input token is NOT a stablecoin (output verification in finalize).

accounts.name: instructions_sysvar
docs: Instructions sysvar for verifying DeFi instruction program_id
and protocol slippage enforcement.

instructions.name: withdraw_funds
docs: Withdraw tokens from the vault back to the owner.

accounts.name: vault_token_account
docs: Vault's PDA-controlled token account

accounts.name: owner_token_account
docs: Owner's token account to receive funds

errors.name: VaultNotActive
errors.msg: Vault is not active

errors.name: UnauthorizedAgent
errors.msg: Unauthorized: signer is not the registered agent

errors.name: UnauthorizedOwner
errors.msg: Unauthorized: signer is not the vault owner

errors.name: UnsupportedToken
errors.msg: Token is not a supported stablecoin (only USDC and USDT)

errors.name: ProtocolNotAllowed
errors.msg: Protocol not allowed by policy

errors.name: TransactionTooLarge
errors.msg: Transaction exceeds maximum single transaction size

errors.name: SpendingCapExceeded
errors.msg: Rolling 24h spending cap would be exceeded

errors.name: LeverageTooHigh
errors.msg: Leverage exceeds maximum allowed

errors.name: SessionNotAuthorized
errors.msg: Session not authorized

errors.name: InvalidSession
errors.msg: Invalid session: does not belong to this vault

errors.name: TooManyAllowedProtocols
errors.msg: Policy configuration invalid: too many allowed protocols

errors.name: AgentAlreadyRegistered
errors.msg: Agent already registered for this vault

errors.name: NoAgentRegistered
errors.msg: No agent registered for this vault

errors.name: VaultNotFrozen
errors.msg: Vault is not frozen (expected frozen for reactivation)

errors.name: VaultAlreadyClosed
errors.msg: Vault is already closed

errors.name: InsufficientBalance
errors.msg: Insufficient vault balance for withdrawal

errors.name: DeveloperFeeTooHigh
errors.msg: Developer fee rate exceeds maximum (500 / 1,000,000 = 5 BPS)

errors.name: InvalidFeeDestination
errors.msg: Fee destination account invalid

errors.name: InvalidProtocolTreasury
errors.msg: Protocol treasury account does not match expected address

errors.name: InvalidAgentKey
errors.msg: Invalid agent: cannot be the zero address

errors.name: AgentIsOwner
errors.msg: Invalid agent: agent cannot be the vault owner

errors.name: Overflow
errors.msg: Arithmetic overflow

errors.name: InvalidTokenAccount
errors.msg: Token account does not belong to vault or has wrong mint

errors.name: TimelockNotExpired
errors.msg: Timelock period has not expired yet

errors.name: NoTimelockConfigured
errors.msg: No timelock configured on this vault

errors.name: DestinationNotAllowed
errors.msg: Destination not in allowed list

errors.name: TooManyDestinations
errors.msg: Too many destinations (max 10)

errors.name: InvalidProtocolMode
errors.msg: Invalid protocol mode (must be 0, 1, or 2)

errors.name: InvalidNonSpendingAmount
errors.msg: Non-spending action must have amount = 0

errors.name: CpiCallNotAllowed
errors.msg: Instruction must be top-level (CPI calls not allowed)

errors.name: MissingFinalizeInstruction
errors.msg: Transaction must include finalize_session after validate

errors.name: NonTrackedSwapMustReturnStablecoin
errors.msg: Non-stablecoin swap must return stablecoin (balance did not increase)

errors.name: SwapSlippageExceeded
errors.msg: Swap slippage exceeds policy max_slippage_bps or quoted output is zero

errors.name: InvalidJupiterInstruction
errors.msg: Cannot parse Jupiter swap instruction data

errors.name: UnauthorizedTokenTransfer
errors.msg: Top-level SPL Token transfer not allowed between validate and finalize

errors.name: SlippageBpsTooHigh
errors.msg: Slippage BPS exceeds maximum (5000 = 50%)

errors.name: ProtocolMismatch
errors.msg: DeFi instruction program does not match declared target_protocol

errors.name: TooManyDeFiInstructions
errors.msg: Spending allows at most one DeFi instruction

errors.name: MaxAgentsReached
errors.msg: Maximum agents per vault reached (limit: 10)

errors.name: InsufficientPermissions
errors.msg: Agent lacks permission for this action type

errors.name: InvalidPermissions
errors.msg: Permission bitmask contains invalid bits

errors.name: EscrowNotActive
errors.msg: Escrow is not in Active status

errors.name: EscrowExpired
errors.msg: Escrow has expired

errors.name: EscrowNotExpired
errors.msg: Escrow has not expired yet

errors.name: InvalidEscrowVault
errors.msg: Invalid escrow vault

errors.name: EscrowConditionsNotMet
errors.msg: Escrow conditions not met

errors.name: EscrowDurationExceeded
errors.msg: Escrow duration exceeds maximum (30 days)

errors.name: InvalidConstraintConfig
errors.msg: Invalid constraint configuration: bounds exceeded

errors.name: ConstraintViolated
errors.msg: Instruction constraint violated

errors.name: InvalidConstraintsPda
errors.msg: Invalid constraints PDA: wrong owner or vault

errors.name: InvalidPendingConstraintsPda
errors.msg: Invalid pending constraints PDA: wrong owner or vault

errors.name: AgentSpendLimitExceeded
errors.msg: Agent rolling 24h spend exceeds per-agent spending limit

errors.name: OverlaySlotExhausted
errors.msg: Per-agent overlay is full; cannot register agent with spending limit

errors.name: AgentSlotNotFound
errors.msg: Agent has per-agent spending limit but no overlay tracking slot

errors.name: UnauthorizedTokenApproval
errors.msg: Unauthorized SPL Token Approve between validate and finalize

errors.name: InvalidSessionExpiry
errors.msg: Session expiry slots out of range (10-450)

errors.name: UnconstrainedProgramBlocked
errors.msg: Program has no constraint entry and strict mode is enabled

errors.name: ProtocolCapExceeded
errors.msg: Per-protocol rolling 24h spending cap would be exceeded

errors.name: ProtocolCapsMismatch
errors.msg: protocol_caps length must match protocols length when has_protocol_caps is true

errors.name: ActiveEscrowsExist
errors.msg: Cannot close vault with active escrow deposits

errors.name: ConstraintsNotClosed
errors.msg: Instruction constraints must be closed before closing vault

errors.name: PendingPolicyExists
errors.msg: Pending policy update must be applied or cancelled before closing vault

errors.name: AgentPaused
errors.msg: Agent is paused and cannot execute actions

errors.name: AgentAlreadyPaused
errors.msg: Agent is already paused

errors.name: AgentNotPaused
errors.msg: Agent is not paused

errors.name: UnauthorizedPostFinalizeInstruction
errors.msg: Instructions after finalize_session must be ComputeBudget or SystemProgram only

errors.name: UnexpectedBalanceDecrease
errors.msg: Vault balance decreased more than delegated amount — potential CPI attack

errors.name: TimelockTooShort
errors.msg: Timelock duration below minimum (1800 seconds / 30 minutes)

errors.name: PolicyVersionMismatch
errors.msg: Policy version mismatch — policy changed since agent's last RPC read

errors.name: PendingAgentPermsExists
errors.msg: A pending agent permissions update already exists for this agent

errors.name: PendingCloseConstraintsExists
errors.msg: A pending close constraints operation already exists for this vault

errors.name: ActiveSessionsExist
errors.msg: Cannot close vault with active sessions (finalize pending sessions first)

errors.name: PostAssertionFailed
errors.msg: Post-execution assertion failed: account state did not satisfy constraint

errors.name: InvalidPostAssertionIndex
errors.msg: Post-assertion constraint references invalid instruction index

errors.name: UnauthorizedPreValidateInstruction
errors.msg: Non-infrastructure instruction detected before validate_and_authorize

errors.name: SnapshotNotCaptured
errors.msg: Delta assertion snapshot was not captured in validate_and_authorize

errors.name: ConstraintIndexOutOfBounds
errors.msg: Constraint entry index out of bounds for zero-copy array

errors.name: InvalidConstraintOperator
errors.msg: Constraint operator value is not a valid ConstraintOperator discriminant

errors.name: ConstraintsVaultMismatch
errors.msg: Zero-copy constraints account has wrong vault

errors.name: ConstraintEntryCountExceeded
errors.msg: Cannot pack entries: entry count exceeds MAX_CONSTRAINT_ENTRIES

errors.name: BlockedSplOpcode
errors.msg: SPL opcode is blocked at runtime and cannot be used in constraints

types.name: AccountConstraint
docs: Account-index constraint: requires a specific pubkey at a specific account index.

types.name: AgentContributionEntry
docs: Per-agent contribution entry within an overlay.
Tracks each agent's individual spend contributions using a 24-bucket
hourly epoch scheme with per-entry `last_write_epoch` for correct gap-zeroing.
Layout: 32 (agent) + 8 (last_write_epoch) + 8 × 24 (contributions) = 232 bytes

fields.name: agent
docs: Agent pubkey stored as raw bytes (zero_copy requires fixed-size)

fields.name: last_write_epoch
docs: The epoch number of the most recent write to this entry.
Used to derive which buckets are stale via modular arithmetic.
epoch = unix_timestamp / OVERLAY_EPOCH_DURATION (3600)

fields.name: contributions
docs: Per-epoch USD contributions from this agent.
Indexed by `epoch % OVERLAY_NUM_EPOCHS`.

fields.name: capability
docs: Agent capability: 0=Disabled, 1=Observer (non-spending), 2=Operator (full).
Replaces the 21-bit ActionType permission bitmask.

types.name: AgentSpendOverlay
docs: Per-vault overlay PDA tracking per-agent spend contributions.
Seeds: `[b"agent_spend", vault.key().as_ref(), &[0u8]]`
Supports up to 10 agents (matches MAX_AGENTS_PER_VAULT).
Size calculation:
8 (discriminator) + 32 (vault) + 232 × 10 (entries) + 1 (bump) + 7 (padding) + 80 (lifetime_spend) + 80 (lifetime_tx_count) = 2,528 bytes

fields.name: vault
docs: Associated vault pubkey

fields.name: entries
docs: Agent contribution entries (up to MAX_OVERLAY_ENTRIES agents)

fields.name: bump
docs: Bump seed for PDA

fields.name: _padding
docs: Padding for 8-byte alignment

fields.name: lifetime_spend
docs: Per-agent cumulative spend in USD base units. Index matches entries[i].
DESIGN DECISION: Tracks spend only, NOT profit/loss.
Per-agent P&L requires oracles (removed by design) and protocol-specific
position reading (violates protocol-agnostic principle). Realized P&L
can be derived in the SDK by correlating agent spend events with vault
balance changes. See agent-analytics.ts for the SDK implementation.
Found by: Persona test (Treasury Manager "David")
Appended AFTER existing layout to preserve zero-copy byte offsets.

fields.name: lifetime_tx_count
docs: Per-agent cumulative transaction count. Index matches entries[i].
Incremented in finalize_session for EVERY successful spending session.
Used for: avg TX size (lifetime_spend / lifetime_tx_count), agent activity ranking.

fields.name: owner
docs: The owner who created this vault (has full authority)

fields.name: vault_id
docs: Unique vault identifier (allows one owner to have multiple vaults)

fields.name: agents
docs: Registered agents with per-agent permission bitmasks (max 10)

fields.name: fee_destination
docs: Developer fee destination — IMMUTABLE after initialization.
Prevents a compromised owner from redirecting fees.

fields.name: status
docs: Vault status: Active, Frozen, or Closed

fields.name: bump
docs: Bump seed for PDA derivation

fields.name: created_at
docs: Unix timestamp of vault creation

fields.name: total_transactions
docs: Total number of agent transactions executed through this vault

fields.name: total_volume
docs: Total volume processed in token base units

fields.name: active_escrow_count
docs: Number of active (unsettled/unrefunded) escrow deposits from this vault

fields.name: total_fees_collected
docs: Cumulative developer fees collected from this vault (token base units)

fields.name: total_deposited_usd
docs: Cumulative stablecoin deposits in base units (USDC/USDT, 6 decimals).
Incremented in deposit_funds for stablecoin mints only.
Used for P&L: current_balance - total_deposited_usd + total_withdrawn_usd.
Cumulative gross — never decremented. Informational only, never authorization input.

fields.name: total_withdrawn_usd
docs: Cumulative stablecoin withdrawals in base units (USDC/USDT, 6 decimals).
Incremented in withdraw_funds for stablecoin mints only.

fields.name: total_failed_transactions
docs: Cumulative failed + expired session count.
Incremented in finalize_session when success=false OR is_expired=true.
Used for success rate: total_transactions / (total_transactions + total_failed_transactions).
Informational only — never used in authorization decisions.

fields.name: active_sessions
docs: Number of active (not yet finalized) sessions for this vault.
Incremented in validate_and_authorize, decremented in finalize_session.
close_vault requires this to be 0.

fields.name: is_spending
docs: Spending classification: 1=Spending, 2=NonSpending. Required (0 rejected).

fields.name: discriminator_format
docs: Discriminator format for this entry's target program. Controls the
minimum byte length of the first DataConstraint (the A5 anchor).
Default: Anchor8 (0). Use Spl1 (1) for SPL Token / Token-2022.

types.name: ConstraintEntryZC
docs: BYTE LAYOUT REGISTRY — Canonical assignment of padding bytes.
Layout (post position-counter removal, council decision 2026-04-19):
byte 554: is_spending
byte 555: discriminator_format
bytes 556-559: _padding[4]  (reserved for future use)
Position_effect (formerly byte 555) was deleted with the entire position
counter system. The freed byte is absorbed by _padding to preserve the
560-byte total — shrinking the struct would corrupt every existing
on-chain InstructionConstraints PDA (35,888-byte zero-copy account).

fields.name: is_spending
docs: Spending classification: 0=Unset (treated as spending), 1=Spending, 2=NonSpending.
Set by vault owner at constraint creation time. The constraint engine returns
this value when it matches an entry — replaces ActionType.is_spending().

fields.name: discriminator_format
docs: DiscriminatorFormat discriminant (0=Anchor8, 1=Spl1). Write-time only —
verify_data_constraints_zc() does not read this field at runtime.
Zero-initialized on existing V1 PDAs → 0 → Anchor8 (backward compatible).

fields.name: discriminator_formats
docs: Per-entry discriminator format (0=Anchor8, 1=Spl1) from the applied entries.
Emitted at apply time so monitors see the active format when it takes effect.

fields.name: discriminator_formats
docs: Per-entry discriminator format (0=Anchor8, 1=Spl1).
Enables off-chain monitors to detect format changes/downgrades.

types.name: DiscriminatorFormat
docs: Discriminator format for the first DataConstraint in a ConstraintEntry.
Controls the minimum byte length required for the instruction discriminator
anchor (A5 invariant). Different Solana programs use different discriminator
widths — Anchor uses 8-byte SHA-256 prefixes, SPL Token uses 1-byte enum
indices. The format is checked at constraint creation time only; runtime
verification in verify_data_constraints_zc() uses value_len directly.

types.name: EpochBucket
docs: A single epoch bucket tracking aggregate USD spend.
16 bytes per bucket. USD-only — rate limiting stays client-side.

fields.name: epoch_id
docs: Epoch identifier: unix_timestamp / EPOCH_DURATION

fields.name: usd_amount
docs: Aggregate USD spent in this epoch (6 decimals)

fields.name: constraint_version
docs: Constraint schema version. Always 1 for new deployments.

fields.name: discriminator_formats
docs: Per-entry discriminator format (0=Anchor8, 1=Spl1).
Enables off-chain monitors to detect format changes/downgrades.

types.name: PendingAgentPermissionsUpdate
docs: Queued agent permissions update. Timelock-gated.
PDA seeds: [b"pending_agent_perms", vault.key().as_ref(), agent.as_ref()]
Per-agent PDA — allows concurrent pending updates for different agents.

types.name: PendingCloseConstraints
docs: Queued constraint closure. Minimal — just needs the timelock gate.
PDA seeds: [b"pending_close_constraints", vault.key().as_ref()]

types.name: PendingConstraintsUpdate
docs: Queued instruction constraints update that becomes executable after
a timelock period. Mirrors `PendingPolicyUpdate` pattern.
PDA seeds: `[b"pending_constraints", vault.key().as_ref()]`
Zero-copy layout — same entries array as InstructionConstraints
plus queued_at and executes_at timestamps.

fields.name: vault
docs: Associated vault pubkey (as raw bytes for Pod compatibility)

fields.name: entries
docs: New constraint entries to apply (fixed array, use entry_count for active)

fields.name: entry_count
docs: Number of active entries (0..=64)

fields.name: strict_mode
docs: Whether to reject programs without matching constraint entries (0 = permissive, non-zero = strict)

fields.name: bump
docs: Bump seed for PDA

fields.name: _padding
docs: Alignment padding

fields.name: queued_at
docs: Unix timestamp when this update was queued

fields.name: executes_at
docs: Unix timestamp when this update becomes executable

types.name: PendingPolicyUpdate
docs: Queued policy update that becomes executable after a timelock period.
Created by `queue_policy_update`, applied by `apply_pending_policy`,
or cancelled by `cancel_pending_policy`.
PDA seeds: `[b"pending_policy", vault.key().as_ref()]`

fields.name: vault
docs: Associated vault pubkey

fields.name: queued_at
docs: Unix timestamp when this update was queued

fields.name: executes_at
docs: Unix timestamp when this update becomes executable

fields.name: bump
docs: Bump seed for PDA

fields.name: vault
docs: Associated vault pubkey

fields.name: daily_spending_cap_usd
docs: Maximum aggregate spend per rolling 24h period in USD (6 decimals).
$500 = 500_000_000. This is the primary spending cap.

fields.name: max_transaction_size_usd
docs: Maximum single transaction size in USD (6 decimals).

fields.name: protocol_mode
docs: Protocol access control mode:
0 = all allowed (protocols list ignored)
1 = allowlist (only protocols in list)
2 = denylist (all except protocols in list)

fields.name: protocols
docs: Protocol pubkeys for allowlist/denylist.
Bounded to MAX_ALLOWED_PROTOCOLS entries.

fields.name: max_leverage_bps
docs: DEPRECATED: Not enforced on-chain. Kept for layout stability. See Phase B3 post-assertions.

fields.name: developer_fee_rate
docs: Developer fee rate (rate / 1,000,000). Applied to every finalized
transaction. Max MAX_DEVELOPER_FEE_RATE (500 = 5 BPS).

fields.name: max_slippage_bps
docs: Maximum slippage tolerance for Jupiter swaps in basis points.
0 = reject all swaps (vault owner must explicitly configure).
Enforced on-chain via instruction introspection of Jupiter data.

fields.name: timelock_duration
docs: Timelock duration in seconds for policy changes. 0 = no timelock.

fields.name: allowed_destinations
docs: Allowed destination addresses for agent transfers.
Empty = any destination allowed. Bounded to MAX_ALLOWED_DESTINATIONS.

fields.name: has_constraints
docs: Whether instruction constraints PDA exists for this vault.
Set true by create_instruction_constraints, false by apply_close_constraints.

fields.name: has_pending_policy
docs: Whether a pending policy update PDA exists for this vault.
Set true by queue_policy_update, false by apply/cancel_pending_policy.

fields.name: has_protocol_caps
docs: Whether per-protocol spend caps are configured.
Requires protocol_mode == ALLOWLIST and protocol_caps.len() == protocols.len().

fields.name: protocol_caps
docs: Per-protocol daily spending caps in USD (6 decimals).
Index-aligned with `protocols`. Only enforced when `has_protocol_caps = true`.
A value of 0 means no per-protocol limit (global cap still applies).

fields.name: session_expiry_slots
docs: Configurable session expiry in slots. 0 = use default (SESSION_EXPIRY_SLOTS = 20).
Valid range when non-zero: 10-450 slots.

fields.name: bump
docs: Bump seed for PDA

fields.name: policy_version
docs: Policy version counter for OCC (optimistic concurrency control).
Incremented on every apply_pending_policy and apply_constraints_update.
Agents include expected_policy_version in validate_and_authorize;
program rejects if version changed since the agent's RPC read.

fields.name: has_post_assertions
docs: Whether native PostExecutionAssertions are configured for this vault.
When true, finalize_session requires the assertions PDA in remaining_accounts.
0 = no assertions, non-zero = assertions required.

types.name: PostAssertionEntry
docs: Borsh-serializable assertion entry (instruction parameter form).

fields.name: cross_field_offset_b
docs: Phase B3: second field offset for CrossFieldLte (0 if unused)

fields.name: cross_field_multiplier_bps
docs: Phase B3: multiplier in BPS for CrossFieldLte (0 if unused)

fields.name: cross_field_flags
docs: Phase B3: flags byte — bit 0 = enable CrossFieldLte (0 if unused)

types.name: PostAssertionEntryZC
docs: Post-execution assertion: checks account data bytes AFTER the DeFi
instruction executes, within the same atomic transaction.
Same bytes-at-offset pattern as DataConstraintZC, but applied to
account data instead of instruction data. Protocol-agnostic — the
vault owner configures byte offsets from protocol documentation.
Phase B1: absolute value assertions (check field ≤ max, field ≥ min).
Phase B3 will add CrossFieldLte for leverage ratio enforcement.

fields.name: target_account
docs: The account to read after execution (passed via remaining_accounts).
Typically a Position PDA, User account, or similar protocol state.

fields.name: offset
docs: Byte offset in the target account's data to read.

fields.name: value_len
docs: Length of the value to compare (1-32 bytes).

fields.name: operator
docs: Comparison operator (reuses ConstraintOperator: Eq, Ne, Gte, Lte, etc.)

fields.name: expected_value
docs: Expected value for comparison (same max as DataConstraint).

fields.name: assertion_mode
docs: Assertion mode:
0 = Absolute: check current value against expected_value
1 = MaxDecrease: check (snapshot - current) ≤ expected_value (Phase B2)
NOTE: If value increases (current > snapshot), check ALWAYS PASSES (saturating sub = 0).
For bidirectional protection, pair with MaxIncrease or use NoChange.
2 = MaxIncrease: check (current - snapshot) ≤ expected_value (Phase B2)
NOTE: If value decreases, check ALWAYS PASSES.
3 = NoChange: check current == snapshot — byte-for-byte equality (Phase B2)

fields.name: cross_field_offset_b
docs: Phase B3: Second field offset for CrossFieldLte (little-endian u16).
When cross_field_flags & 0x01: read field_B at offset_b (value_len bytes) from same target.
Check: field_A × 10000 ≤ multiplier_bps × field_B (using u128 arithmetic).
Stored as [u8; 2] for zero-copy Pod alignment compatibility.

fields.name: cross_field_multiplier_bps
docs: Phase B3: Multiplier in basis points for CrossFieldLte (little-endian u32).
Must be > 0 when cross_field_flags is enabled.
Stored as [u8; 4] for zero-copy Pod alignment compatibility.

fields.name: cross_field_flags
docs: Phase B3: Flags byte. Bit 0 = enable CrossFieldLte.
When enabled, assertion_mode MUST be 0 (Absolute).
Unknown bits (1-7) must be 0.

types.name: PostExecutionAssertions
docs: On-chain account storing post-execution assertions for a vault.
Seeds: [b"post_assertions", vault.key()]

fields.name: vault
docs: The vault this assertion set belongs to.

fields.name: entries
docs: Assertion entries (fixed-size array, up to MAX_POST_ASSERTION_ENTRIES).

fields.name: entry_count
docs: Number of active entries (0..=4).

fields.name: bump
docs: PDA bump seed.

fields.name: _padding
docs: Reserved for future use.

types.name: ProtocolSpendCounter
docs: Per-protocol spend counter using simple 24h window.
When current_epoch - window_start >= 144, the window is expired and resets to 0.
48 bytes per entry (32 + 8 + 8).

fields.name: protocol
docs: Protocol program ID

fields.name: window_start
docs: Window start timestamp (for future rolling window)

fields.name: window_spend
docs: Accumulated spend in window (for future cap enforcement)

fields.name: vault
docs: Associated vault

fields.name: agent
docs: The agent who initiated this session

fields.name: authorized
docs: Whether this session has been authorized by the permission check

fields.name: authorized_amount
docs: Authorized action details (for verification in finalize)

fields.name: is_spending
docs: Whether the matched constraint entry classifies this as spending.
Derived from amount > 0 in validate_and_authorize.

fields.name: expires_at_slot
docs: Slot-based expiry: session is valid until this slot

fields.name: delegated
docs: Whether token delegation was set up (approve CPI)

fields.name: delegation_token_account
docs: The vault's token account that was delegated to the agent
(only meaningful when delegated == true)

fields.name: protocol_fee
docs: Protocol fee collected during validate (for event logging in finalize)

fields.name: developer_fee
docs: Developer fee collected during validate (for event logging in finalize)

fields.name: output_mint
docs: Stablecoin mint for outcome-based spending detection.
For stablecoin input: set to authorized_token (the stablecoin being spent).
For non-stablecoin input: set to the expected stablecoin output mint.
Pubkey::default() for non-spending actions (no outcome check needed).

fields.name: stablecoin_balance_before
docs: Snapshot of the relevant stablecoin account balance before the swap.
For stablecoin input: vault_token_account.amount (taken before fee collection).
For non-stablecoin input: output_stablecoin_account.amount.
0 for non-spending actions.

fields.name: bump
docs: Bump seed for PDA

fields.name: assertion_snapshots
docs: Phase B2: Snapshots of target account bytes captured in validate_and_authorize
before DeFi instruction executes. Index i corresponds to PostAssertionEntry i.
Used by delta assertion modes (1=MaxDecrease, 2=MaxIncrease, 3=NoChange).

fields.name: snapshot_lens
docs: Phase B2: Actual value_len captured for each snapshot.
0 = no snapshot captured (mode 0 entries). Non-zero = snapshot was captured.
finalize_session cross-checks snapshot_lens[i] == entry.value_len.

fields.name: actual_spend_usd
docs: Actual stablecoin spend measured by balance delta (0 for non-spending actions).

fields.name: balance_after_usd
docs: Vault stablecoin balance after this transaction (0 for non-spending).

fields.name: is_spending
docs: Whether this was a spending action.

types.name: SpendTracker
docs: Zero-copy 144-epoch circular buffer for rolling 24h USD spend tracking.
Each bucket covers a 10-minute epoch. Boundary correction ensures
functionally exact accuracy (~$0.000001 worst-case rounding).
Rounding direction: slightly permissive (under-counts by at most $0.000001).
Seeds: `[b"tracker", vault.key().as_ref()]`

fields.name: vault
docs: Associated vault pubkey

fields.name: buckets
docs: 144 epoch buckets for rolling 24h spend tracking

fields.name: protocol_counters
docs: Reserved per-protocol spend counters (zeroed, no enforcement yet)

fields.name: last_write_epoch
docs: Epoch of most recent record_spend() call. Enables early exit in get_rolling_24h_usd().
Zero-initialized — value 0 correctly triggers early exit (current_epoch >> 144).

fields.name: bump
docs: Bump seed for PDA

fields.name: _padding
docs: Padding for 8-byte alignment

types.name: VaultStatus
docs: Vault status enum
